dct_title_s:
Plan de la Baye Simon, Situé au Cap de Bonne Espérance, suivant les
          Observations faites en Août et Septembre 1775, par Mr. Dalrymple
dct_alternative_sm: Plan of Simon's Bay at the Cape of Good Hope
dct_description_sm:
Apres de Mannevillette "was the first to determine longitude by measuring the distances
        of the sun and moon." Soundings are in French fathoms. Top right: 8.d.
dct_rights_sm: Image from the Dr. Oscar I. Norwich collection of maps of Africa and its islands, 1486 - ca. 1865 courtesy Stanford University Libraries. This item is in the public domain. There are no restrictions on use. If you have questions, please contact the David Rumsey Map Center at rumseymapcenter@stanford.edu.
